title: DB corruption following rollback-WAL-VACUUM-rollback
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
